01_initial_request.user_intent: systematically optimize the scoring of antibody–antigen docked poses starting from unbound homology models
01_initial_request.quantifiable_goal: include at least one 'Adequate' pose for 88.4% of queries and increase median ROC AUC for epitope prediction to 0.720

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Antibody-antigen complex structures are needed but experimental methods are low throughput. [Gap] A nonredundant dataset of sequences with known structures is required for training and validation. [Decision] To achieve a diverse training set, chose to use PDB filtering and CD-HIT to perform redundancy filtering on antibody-antigen complexes, expecting to obtain 622 nonredundant pairs.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: 722 nonredundant antibody-antigen model pairs initially, reduced to 622 after excluding pairs with RMSD > 6A.

references.relevance: Describes CD-HIT tool used for clustering sequences.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Input data consists of antibody sequences. [Gap] 3D structures are required for docking but only sequences are available. [Decision] To achieve structural models, chose to use Repertoire Builder to perform antibody variable region modeling, expecting to obtain antibody models with realistic noise.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Antibody variable regions modeled with mean paratope Calpha RMSD of 2.71A.

references.relevance: Describes Repertoire Builder tool for structural modeling.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Antigen sequences are available. [Gap] Antigen 3D structures are required for docking. [Decision] To achieve antigen alignment, chose to use Forte to perform template alignments, expecting to obtain alignment data for modeling.

parameters.template_restriction: No bound antibody or <50% epitope overlap

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Template alignments computed for antigen modeling.

references.relevance: Describes Forte tool for profile-profile comparison.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Antigen template alignments are ready. [Gap] 3D backbone structure is needed. [Decision] To achieve 3D rendering, chose to use Spanner to perform structure rendering, expecting to obtain 3D antigen backbone.

references.relevance: Describes Spanner tool for protein structure modeling.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Antigen backbone is ready. [Gap] Side chains need to be added for docking. [Decision] To achieve full antigen models, chose to use SCWRL4 to perform side chain replacement, expecting to obtain complete antigen structures.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Full antigen models generated with mean epitope Calpha RMSD of 1.18A.

references.relevance: Describes SCWRL4 for side-chain conformation prediction.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Antibody models are available. [Gap] Paratope residues need to be identified to guide docking. [Decision] To achieve paratope prediction, chose to use Initial_Paratope_ML (DNN) to perform binding residue classification, expecting to obtain paratope probabilities.

parameters.features: sequence, physico-chemical, conservation, ASA, surface shape

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Mean test ROC AUC of 89.8% for paratope prediction.

references.relevance: Describes TensorFlow API used for DNN.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Antigen models are available. [Gap] Epitope residues need to be identified to guide local docking. [Decision] To achieve initial epitope prediction, chose to use Initial_Epitope_ML (DNN) to perform binding residue classification, expecting to obtain epitope probabilities.

parameters.features: amino acid, conservation, ASA, surface shape

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Mean test ROC AUC of 0.683 for initial epitope prediction.

references.relevance: Describes TensorFlow API used for DNN.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Structural models and paratope/epitope predictions are ready. [Gap] Global docking poses are needed to sample binding modes. [Decision] To achieve global sampling, chose to use Piper to perform global antibody-antigen docking, expecting to obtain 70,000 poses per query.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: 70,000 poses generated per query; 95.8% of queries produced at least one True pose.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Raw Piper poses are generated. [Gap] Poses need to be scored to identify likely binding modes. [Decision] To achieve pose scoring, chose to use Piper_Docking_ML (XGBoost) to perform classification of True/False poses, expecting to obtain scored Piper poses.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Mean ROC AUC of 0.692 for Piper pose scoring.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Initial epitope predictions are available. [Gap] Local docking around epitope patches is needed for refinement. [Decision] To achieve local sampling, chose to use Hex to perform local antibody-antigen docking, expecting to obtain poses centered on epitope patches.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Median 472,087 poses generated; 93.7% of queries produced at least one True pose.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Raw Hex poses are generated. [Gap] Poses need to be scored to identify likely binding modes. [Decision] To achieve pose scoring, chose to use Hex_Docking_ML (XGBoost) to perform classification of True/False poses, expecting to obtain scored Hex poses.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Mean ROC AUC of 0.599 for Hex pose scoring.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Scored Piper and Hex poses are available. [Gap] Poses from different engines need to be compared on a common scale. [Decision] To achieve pose integration, chose to use IRMSD Clustering Algorithm to perform coclustering of poses, expecting to obtain cluster representatives.
02_agent_trajectory.observation: Cluster representatives defined; True pose enrichment dropped to 3.9% but True Rank improved.

references.relevance: Defines IRMSD metric used for clustering.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Cluster representatives are available. [Gap] A unified score is needed to rank combined poses. [Decision] To achieve final pose ranking, chose to use Piper_Hex_Docking_ML (XGBoostRegressor) to perform rescoring against 1/IRMSD^2, expecting to obtain final ranked poses.

parameters.features: AbAdapt score, clashes, raw energy, cluster size

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Query coverage of 88.4% (550/622) with at least one Adequate pose; Median True Rank of 22.

references.relevance: DockQ score context for pose quality.

02_agent_trajectory.thought: [Background] Top-scoring docked poses are available. [Gap] Epitope prediction can be improved using docking information. [Decision] To achieve antibody-specific epitope prediction, chose to use Final_Epitope_ML (DNN) to perform reprediction using docking-derived features, expecting to obtain improved ROC AUC.

parameters.features: conservation, ASA, surface shape, docking score joint frequency

02_agent_trajectory.observation: Median ROC AUC increased to 0.720 in cross-validation and 0.730 in holdout set.

references.relevance: Describes Adam optimizer used in DNN.

03_success_verification.validation_technique: Leave-one-out cross-validation (LOOCV) and Holdout set evaluation

adequate_pose_coverage.interpretation: 550/622 queries included at least one Adequate pose in the final set of cluster representatives.

median_true_rank.interpretation: Median rank of the top-ranked True cluster representative (IQR 5-77).

epitope_prediction_roc_auc_cv.interpretation: Median ROC AUC for epitope prediction in cross-validation after including docking features.

epitope_prediction_roc_auc_holdout.interpretation: Median ROC AUC for epitope prediction in holdout set after including docking features.

03_success_verification.final_verdict: Achieved. The pipeline successfully included at least one Adequate pose for 88.4% of queries and increased median ROC AUC for epitope prediction to 0.720 (CV) and 0.730 (Holdout), meeting the quantifiable goals.
